case_title: ANGEL TENORIO VS. IVAN G. IVAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENORIO, ANGEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY TENORIO, ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT IVAN, IVAN G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENORIO, ANGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVAN, IVAN G. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $3.33 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $103.33, DEFENDANT HAS A WAIVER ON FILE FOR COSTS AND FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. SERVED AUG-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IVAN, IVAN G.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANGEL TENORIO AND NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
